scripts.cap:sync: npm run build && npx cap sync ios
scripts.ios:build: npm run cap:sync && cd ios/App && xcodebuild -scheme App -destination 'platform=iOS Simulator,name=iPhone 17 Pro' -configuration Debug CODE_SIGN_IDENTITY='' CODE_SIGNING_REQUIRED=NO -derivedDataPath /tmp/gassed-build -quiet
scripts.ios:run: xcrun simctl boot 'iPhone 17 Pro' 2>/dev/null; open -a Simulator; xcrun simctl terminate booted com.gassed.app 2>/dev/null; xcrun simctl uninstall booted com.gassed.app 2>/dev/null; xcrun simctl install booted /tmp/gassed-build/Build/Products/Debug-iphonesimulator/App.app && xcrun simctl launch booted com.gassed.app
scripts.ios:dev: npm run ios:build && npm run ios:run
